Great coffee stop with amazing views of the Golden Gate Bridge. We took pictures and walked over the bridge and then stopped here for a break. Had a nice cherry foam matcha and a couple cookies. 
Does get busy though!

Round House Café is one of those spots where the location alone makes it worth the visit. Sitting right next to the Golden Gate Bridge, it offers some of the most incredible views in the entire city. Whether you’re grabbing a coffee before walking the bridge or just taking a moment to enjoy the scenery, it’s a fantastic place to pause and take it all in.

A few of us from The Green Cross staff stopped by while visiting the bridge and really enjoyed the experience. The coffee was great, the service was friendly, and the setting is absolutely unforgettable. If you’re exploring the Golden Gate Bridge area, this is a perfect place to relax for a few minutes and appreciate one of San Francisco’s most iconic views. 🌉☕

Round House Café is a wonderful stop if you’re visiting the Golden Gate Bridge. I ordered a hot chocolate, an orange juice, and their berry bread cake. Both drinks were excellent, and while the pastry was a little on the dry side, it still tasted good. The café itself was clean, well organized, and offered a great variety of drinks and pastries. A convenient, tasty stop before heading out to enjoy the bridge views!
